evidence.scientific_clarity: All four panels directly support the brief's claims: pipeline diagram, ablation bars, training curves, and sensitivity heatmap are all present and readable.
evidence.typography: No pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype=none set; PDF uses Type3 (bitmap) DejaVuSans fonts; SVG text rendered as paths — text is not selectable or editable; DejaVu Sans is the matplotlib default, not a deliberate choice.
evidence.palette: Blue+Orange two-line palette is deuteranopia-safe; YlOrRd sequential colormap is appropriate for the heatmap; no green/red directional misuse.
evidence.layout_density: gridspec(2,3) with width_ratios=[2,1,1] matches brief exactly; panel D spans full bottom row; hspace/wspace tuned; bar labels and heatmap cell annotations avoid overlap.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption covers all panels and cites the key number (64.7); panel C claims faster convergence but gives no final loss values; panel D cites no peak sensitivity value; legend placement in C is inside the plot (acceptable).
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF contains Type3 bitmap fonts (confirmed via pdffonts); script sets neither pdf.fonttype=42 nor rcParams; SVG has 0 <text> elements — all glyphs are outline paths, not selectable text.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (40 KB), figure.png (119 KB), figure.svg (103 KB), caption.tex (642 B), and gen_figure.py (7 KB) all exist and are non-trivial; data.json absent but not a required output.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption identifies each panel's content and includes one numerical anchor (64.7 for full model); missing quantitative claims for panels C (final loss delta) and D (peak/optimal cell value).

overall_strengths: Layout faithfully implements the brief's gridspec(2,3) spec with dominant panel A, correct width ratios, and a full-width bottom heatmap.
Colorblind-safe blue/orange palette with no green/red misuse and an appropriate sequential colormap for the sensitivity sweep.
overall_weaknesses: No pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype=none: all text is bitmapped (Type3) in the PDF and path-outlined in the SVG, making it non-editable and non-selectable in Illustrator/Inkscape.
Caption lacks quantitative specificity for panels C and D — no final loss values or peak heatmap cell cited, weakening the figure's standalone scientific claim.
